  "findings": [
    "Spoil pile placed within 2 feet of the trench edge, creating a cave-in hazard and falling debris risk."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work in the trench.",
    "Move the excavated spoil pile at least 2 feet back from the edge of the excavation."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P (specifically 1926.651(j)(2)) requires that excavated materials, spoils, and equipment be kept at least 2 feet (0.61 m) from the edge of excavations to prevent materials from falling or rolling into the trench and to reduce the surcharge load on the trench walls.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.651(j)(2)"
  ]
}
